zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Héron於大約1350年出生在英國諾圖波藍德福特時，他的父親William Heron I47歲，母親Isabel de Grey36歲。他於大約1370年與Margaret de Hastings在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年之前在英國坎布利其爾可洛頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Héron于大约1350年出生在英国諾圖波藍德福特时，他的父亲William Heron I47岁，母亲Isabel de Grey36岁。他于大约1370年与Margaret de Hastings在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1381年之前在英国坎布利其爾可洛頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Héron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Héron was born about 1350, in Ford, Northumberland, England, his father, William Heron I, was 47 and his mother, Isabel de Grey, was 36. He married Margaret de Hastings about 1370, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1381, in Croydon, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Héron est né environ 1350, à Ford, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Heron I, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Grey, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Hastings environ 1370, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1381, à Croydon, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Héron um 1350 in Ford, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Heron I 47 und seine Mutter Isabel de Grey 36. Er hat um 1370 in England Margaret de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1381 in Croydon, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Héron è nato il circa 1350 nel Ford, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, William Heron I, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Grey, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Hastings circa 1370, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1381, nel Croydon, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Héronが約1350年にイギリスノースウンバーランドフォードで生まれた時，父William Heron Iは47歳，母Isabel de Greyは36歳であった。約1370年にイギリスでMargaret de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年以前にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアクロイドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Héron(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 노르스벌랜드 포드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Heron I(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Grey(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국에서 Margaret de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 이전 영국 캄브리지실르 크로이던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Héron nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Heron I, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Grey, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Hastings aproximadamente 1370, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1381, em Croydon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Héron родился около 1350 г. в местности форд, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Heron I было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Grey, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Hastings около 1370 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1381 г. в местности кроидон, камбриджешир, Англия.

sm.about 1350–before 1381: e tusa o le 1350–a'e le'I oo le 1381

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Héron nació aproximadamente 1350, en Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Heron I, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabel de Grey, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Margaret de Hastings aproximadamente 1370, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1381, en Croydon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
